case_title: CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE INVESTIGATION DIVISION VS NUUMAI, IOANE

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 504852 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE INVESTIGATION DIVISION AS TO DEFENDANT NUUMAI, IOANE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE INVESTIGATION DIVISION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUUMAI, IOANE $933.31 PRINCIPAL, $810.68 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,743.99, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE #504852. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 9/13/90. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
